'''namuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycobacteremia|mycobacteremia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycobacteremia|mycobacteremia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| namuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næmizith|næmizith]] || [[word:næmizij|næmizij]] || [[word:næmizish|næmizish]] || [[word:næmizi|næmizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:namumuzuth|namumuzuth]] || [[word:namumuzuj|namumuzuj]] || [[word:namumuzush|namumuzush]] || [[word:namumuzu|namumuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:namuzuth|namuzuth]] || [[word:namuzuj|namuzuj]] || [[word:namuzush|namuzush]] || [[word:namuzu|namuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:namufzuth|namufzuth]] || [[word:namufzuj|namufzuj]] || [[word:namufzush|namufzush]] || [[word:namufzuf|namufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:namuzuthu|namuzuthu]] || [[word:namuzuju|namuzuju]] || [[word:namuzushu|namuzushu]] || [[word:namuzuku|namuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:namuzuth|namuzuth]] || [[word:namuzuj|namuzuj]] || [[word:namuzush|namuzush]] || [[word:namuzu|namuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:namuzuthul|namuzuthul]] || [[word:namuzujul|namuzujul]] || [[word:namuzushul|namuzushul]] || [[word:namuzukul|namuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:namuzuthuthu|namuzuthuthu]] || [[word:namuzujuju|namuzujuju]] || [[word:namuzushushu|namuzushushu]] || [[word:namuzuku|namuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:namuzuthun|namuzuthun]] || [[word:namuzujun|namuzujun]] || [[word:namuzushun|namuzushun]] || [[word:namuzukun|namuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:namuzuthuoro|namuzuthuoro]] || [[word:namuzujuoro|namuzujuoro]] || [[word:namuzushuoro|namuzushuoro]] || [[word:namuzukuoro|namuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
